title: DrugGen 2: A disease-aware language model for enhancing drug discovery
innovation_summary: DrugGen 2: A disease-aware language model for enhancing drug discovery: To address this gap, we introduce DrugGen-2, a novel generative model that designs small molecules conditioned on both disease ontology and target protein sequences.
